response.justification: Bogdan possesses extensive software engineering experience, strong cloud expertise, and a clear track record of technical leadership and innovation, including entrepreneurial activities. While he has experience with AI infrastructure and tooling at Google, his resume does not explicitly detail leadership in AI product strategy or the development of demonstrated AI-powered products, which are central to this Principal Engineer role. An interview could clarify the depth of his strategic AI involvement.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Proven expertise in cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker).
Strong technical leadership, mentorship, and entrepreneurial background.
concerns: Limited explicit experience in leading AI product strategy or development.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, which is preferred.
AI experience leans towards infrastructure/tooling rather than direct AI-powered product innovation.
